name: 16S_V4_Proteobacteria
description: 16S rRNA hypervariable region V4 in phylum Proteobacteria. Approximately 106 bp on the E. coli numbering scheme (positions 576-682). Gram-negative diverse; e.g. Enterobacter, Pseudomonas, Helicobacter. Species- to genus-level discriminating; real biological variation expected — allow high mismatch during mapping.
